title: SCS: cell segmentation for high-resolution spatial transcriptomics.
author: Chen H Li D Bar-Joseph Z
content: S-EPMC10312435 PMC10312435 SCS: cell segmentation for high-resolution spatial transcriptomics. Spatial transcriptomics promises to greatly improve our understanding of tissue organization and cell-cell interactions.
